title: Ocugen Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ocugen Q2 2023 Earnings Summary. Key Business Developments: Gene Therapy Programs: OCU400 (retinal disease): Received positive Phase 1/2 data in retinitis pigmentosa patients; Phase 3 adult trial planned for late 2023/early 2024. OCU410 (dry AMD): FDA cleared IND; Phase 1/2 trial initiation planned by year-end. OCU410ST (Stargardt disease): Received orphan drug designation; Phase 1/2 trial planned by year-end. Other Programs: NeoCart (cell therapy): Manufacturing facility construction on track for completion by end of 2023; Phase 3 trial planned for H2 2024. OCU500 vaccine series: Seeking non-dilutive government funding for inhaled COVID-19 and flu vaccine platform. OCU200 (diabetic macular edema): FDA hold under review; Phase 1 initiation expected Q4 2023. Financial Results: R&D expenses: $14.2M (vs. $9M year-over-year), including $4.4M non-cash impairment charge. Net loss: $22.9M or $0.10 per share. Cash position: $70.6M as of June 30, 2023. Guidance: Adjusted quarterly burn approximately $15.9M. Management emphasized commitment to filing BLAs across all first-in-class platform technologies within three to five years.
